title: Protect Mobs From Daylight
description: No more burning for mobs under the sun.
body:
### About
This mod, as the name suggests, aims to prevent mobs from being affected by daylight, that is, not burning under the sun.

### Client or Server Side?
It's needed **only server-side**.

### Can I add this mod to my modpack?
Sure.

### What is the difference with [Mob Sunscreen](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-sunscreen)?

The actual difference is tick performance. Mob Sunscreen mod tries to clear fire on every tick (20 ticks = 1 second) on each mob while the game tries to burn them under the sun (check [here](https://gitlab.com/kreezxil/Mob-Sunscreen/-/blob/1.19.2/common/src/main/java/com/kreezcraft/mobsunscreen/CommonClass.java)). This behavior makes tick performance worse. But this is unnecessary because Minecraft already provides a clean way to do this. Protect Mobs From Daylight mod implements this way by turning off the mobs' burning under the sun. For more information, you can check the mentioned code [here](https://github.com/muhammedesadcomert/Protect-Mobs-From-DayLight/blob/multiloader-1.19%2B/common/src/main/java/com/muhammedesadcomert/protectmobsfromdaylight/common/mixin/MobMixin.java).
